name: Wanfo Pagoda
short_description: Game Purpose：Who can take the least days, Way up HT tower top? We tell you: You're buy the future of this game HT Version 2.0, Only Support to 5 floor Least a week or month, we will update and add some feature.
detailed_description:
Game purpose: Who can spend the least time climbing to the top of the Fantasy Tower?

Work hard to climb the tower and unlock more game features

You can sleep in your home to restore your health and status, you can also store your equipment in your home, and you can even synthesize items

You can exercise in the academy to increase attributes, learn skills, and conduct trials

You can buy and sell in the store and work to earn gold coins

You can collect materials to synthesize items

You need to improve the character's attributes through careful arrangements, so as to defeat the enemies in the tower in the least amount of time.

The current 2.0 version of Fantasy Tower has only been developed to 5 floors. It will be opened in the future. Feedback from players needs to be collected to adjust the content that will be released later.
